name: Body Weight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Engage core, push hips back, and bend knees to lower down. Keep chest up and back straight. Lower until thighs are parallel to the floor. Push through heels to stand back up.
key_cues: Keep knees tracking over toes, Engage core, Back straight

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart. Start from a dead hang. Pull yourself up until your chin is above the bar. Lower yourself back down with control to the starting position.
key_cues: Keep core tight, Elbows down and back, Avoid swinging

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width. Hang with arms extended. Pull yourself up until your chin clears the bar. Lower down slowly to the starting position.
key_cues: Pull with your back not arms, Avoid using momentum

name: 90/90 Hip Rotation
instructions: Sit on the floor with front leg at 90° and back leg at 90°. Keep torso upright. Rotate knees and switch sides while keeping feet planted. Use hands for support if needed.
key_cues: Keep chest tall, Rotate from hips, Don’t force the range

name: Nordic Hamstring Curls
instructions:
Kneel on a pad and lower the body under control while the ankles are held in place by a partner, a loaded barbell or other immovable object.
Keep body straight and slowly lean forward from the knees, resisting the descent. Use hands to catch yourself if needed, then push back up.
To control the descent to the floor in the second half of the movement, use a band around your chest attached behind and above you
 - this ensures full activation under a full range of motion.
This exercise primarily builds eccentric, i.e. going down, strength.
The position of the ankle, plantarflexed, i.e. toes pointed down, or dorsiflexed, i.e. toes pointed up, makes the exercise more difficult, or easier, respectively.
key_cues: Maintain straight body line, Engage hamstrings

name: Suspended Hamstring Curl w/ Straps
instructions: tbd
key_cues: tbd

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Lean against a wall, slide down until knees are at 90°, hold the position
key_cues: Keep back flat, Knees above ankles, Engage core

name: Weighted Wall Sit
instructions: Lean against a wall, slide down until knees are at 90°, place a weight on the thighs, hold the position
key_cues: Keep back flat, Knees above ankles, Engage core

name: Single-Leg Wall Sit
instructions: Lean against a wall, slide down until knees are at 90°, lift one leg off ground, hold the position
key_cues: Keep back flat, Knee above ankle, Engage core

name: Push-Ups
primary_muscles: Pectoralis Major, Triceps Brachii, Anterior Deltoids
instructions: Start in plank, lower chest to floor, push back up
key_cues: Keep elbows at 45°, Engage core, Full range of motion

name: Monster Walks w/ Bands
instructions: With band around feet, step side-to-side maintaining squat position
key_cues: Keep tension on band, Control knees, Stay low

name: Standing Dumbbell Curl To Press
instructions: Curl dumbbells, rotate palms up, press overhead, reverse back down
key_cues: Control the curl, Don’t sway, Lock core

name: Low Plank Reach
instructions: From forearm plank, reach one arm forward, alternate sides
key_cues: Keep hips level, Avoid torso twist

name: Low Plank Hold
instructions: Hold forearm plank, straight line head to heels
key_cues: Engage glutes and quads, Don’t let hips sag

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start in high plank, drive knees towards chest alternately
key_cues: Keep hips low, Steady pace, Engage core

name: Dead Bug w/ Roller Squeeze
instructions: Lay on back, hold roller between hands and knees, extend opposite arm/leg
key_cues: Keep core braced, Back flat, Controlled movement

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Start with feet together, arms by sides, jump out spreading legs and arms overhead
key_cues: Keep rhythm, Land softly, Engage core

name: Burpees
primary_muscles: Pectoralis Major, Triceps Brachii, Deltoids, Quadriceps, Gluteus Maximus
instructions: From standing, drop to plank, perform push-up (optional), jump feet in, leap up
key_cues: Move smoothly, Land softly, Engage core

name: Walking Lunges
instructions:
Stand tall with feet hip-width apart, hands on hips or holding dumbbells by your sides.
Step forward with your right leg, lowering your hips until both knees are bent at about 90°.
The back knee should hover just above the floor, front knee directly above the ankle.
Push through your front heel to bring your back leg forward and stand up into the next step.
Repeat, alternating legs as you move forward.
key_cues: Keep chest upright,Engage core throughout the movement, Step far enough forward so your front knee stays over your ankle,Drive through the heel of your front foot when standing up,Keep hips level and avoid wobbling side to side,Control the descent

name: Stability Ball  - Plank
secondary_muscles: Obliques, Deltoids, Gluteus Maximus, Quadriceps, Erector Spinae, Hip Flexors
instructions:
Place your forearms on a stability (Swiss) ball, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Extend your legs behind you so your body forms a straight line from head to heels.
Engage your core, glutes, and quads to hold your body steady.
Maintain a neutral neck and spine position.
Hold for the desired time, keeping the ball as still as possible.
key_cues: Brace your core,Squeeze glutes and quads,Keep body in a straight line,Keep the ball steady,Look slightly ahead or down

name: Hollow Hold
instructions: Lay on back, lift shoulders and legs off floor, hold
key_cues: Lower back stays pressed to floor

name: Hollow Rock
instructions: Lay on back, lift shoulders and legs off floor, rock gently
key_cues: Lower back stays pressed to floor

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart and the bar over midfoot. Hinge at the hips and bend the knees to grip the bar. Brace the core and lift the bar by extending hips and knees until standing tall. Lower the bar under control.
key_cues: Bar close to shins,Chest up,Brace core,Push through heels

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Take a wide stance with toes turned slightly outward. Grip the bar inside the knees. Brace your core and push through the floor to stand upright with the bar. Lower the bar back to the floor with control.
key_cues: Push knees out,Chest tall,Bar close to body

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
instructions: Stand inside a trap bar with feet hip-width apart. Grip the handles and brace your core. Drive through the feet to lift the bar until hips and knees are fully extended. Lower back down under control.
key_cues: Neutral spine,Drive through midfoot,Chest up

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold a barbell or dumbbells in front of your thighs. Slightly bend the knees and hinge at the hips to lower the weight while keeping the back straight. Lower until you feel a hamstring stretch, then extend the hips to stand.
key_cues: Hinge at hips,Slight knee bend,Keep back flat

name: Dumbbell Squat Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height. Perform a squat by bending hips and knees. As you stand up, press the dumbbells overhead. Lower them back to the shoulders and repeat.
key_cues: Smooth transition,Core tight,Heels down

name: Bench Dips
instructions: Place hands on a bench behind you with legs extended. Lower your body by bending the elbows until arms reach about 90°. Push through the hands to extend the elbows and return to the start.
key_cues: Elbows back,Chest up,Control descent

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Plank Row
instructions: Start in a plank with one hand holding a dumbbell. Row the dumbbell toward your hip while stabilizing the torso. Lower it slowly and repeat before switching sides.
key_cues: Keep hips square,Pull elbow back,Brace core

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a bench with feet planted and grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower the bar to the chest with control. Press it back up until arms are fully extended.
key_cues: Shoulder blades tight,Bar to mid-chest,Feet planted

name: Dumbbell Bicep Curls
instructions: Hold dumbbells at your sides with palms facing forward. Curl the weights toward your shoulders while keeping elbows close to the torso. Lower slowly to the starting position.
key_cues: Elbows still,Full range,Control lowering

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand a few feet in front of a bench and place one foot behind you on it. Lower your body by bending the front knee until the thigh is near parallel to the floor. Push through the front heel to stand.
key_cues: Front knee over ankle,Chest upright,Drive through heel

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit on the leg extension machine with knees aligned with the pivot. Extend the legs until straight, squeezing the quadriceps. Lower the weight slowly back down.
key_cues: Control movement,Pause at top,No swinging

name: Ring Row
instructions: Grab the rings and lean back with arms extended. Pull your chest toward the rings by bending the elbows and retracting the shoulder blades. Lower yourself back under control.
key_cues: Body straight,Pull chest to rings,Squeeze shoulder blades

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding dumbbells above your chest. Lower them until elbows reach about 90°. Press the dumbbells back up until arms are extended.
key_cues: Control descent,Wrists neutral,Feet planted

name: Ring Dips
instructions: Support yourself on rings with arms locked out. Lower your body by bending the elbows until shoulders drop below elbows. Push back up to the starting position.
key_cues: Rings close to body,Control descent,Chest forward

name: Dead Curl
instructions: Stand holding a barbell against your thighs. Curl the bar upward without swinging the body. Lower the bar slowly back to the start.
key_cues: No body swing,Elbows tight,Slow lowering

name: Trunk Rotation
instructions: Stand holding a cable or band with arms extended. Rotate your torso away from the anchor point while keeping hips stable. Return slowly to the start.
key_cues: Rotate torso not hips,Core tight,Controlled movement

name: Dumbbell Seal Row
instructions: Lie face down on a bench with arms hanging down holding dumbbells. Pull the weights toward your ribs while squeezing shoulder blades together. Lower under control.
key_cues: Chest supported,Squeeze scapulae,Slow lowering

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand sideways to a cable or band and hold the handle at chest height. Press the handle straight out while resisting torso rotation. Return slowly.
key_cues: Brace core,Don't rotate,Slow control

name: Stability Ball - Plank w/ back-and-forth motion
instructions: Place forearms on a stability ball and extend legs behind you. Roll the ball slightly forward and backward while maintaining a strong plank position.
key_cues: Body straight,Core tight,Control movement

name: Dumbbell Fly on Flat Bench
instructions: Lie on a bench holding dumbbells above your chest. Lower the arms out to the sides with a slight elbow bend until you feel a chest stretch. Bring the weights back together above the chest.
key_cues: Soft elbows,Stretch chest,Control movement

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height. Press them overhead until arms are straight. Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
key_cues: Core tight,Avoid arching back,Smooth press

name: Military Press
instructions: Hold a barbell at shoulder height with hands just outside shoulders. Press the bar overhead until arms are fully extended. Lower it back down under control.
key_cues: Brace core,Bar over midfoot,Full lockout

name: Plank Dumbbell Drag
instructions: Start in a plank with a dumbbell beside one hand. Drag the dumbbell across your body to the other side using the opposite hand. Alternate sides.
key_cues: Minimize hip rotation,Core tight,Slow drag

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel with hands on an ab wheel. Roll the wheel forward while keeping hips extended and core tight. Pull it back to the starting position.
key_cues: Avoid arching back,Control rollout,Engage core

name: Wall Balls
instructions: Hold a medicine ball at chest height. Perform a squat and then explosively stand while throwing the ball toward a wall target. Catch and repeat.
key_cues: Explosive drive,Full squat,Soft catch

name: Sit-Ups
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet on the floor. Curl your torso upward until your chest approaches your thighs. Lower slowly back down.
key_cues: Avoid pulling neck,Control descent,Engage core

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Rest your upper back on a bench with a barbell or weight over your hips. Lower the hips toward the floor then drive them upward until the torso is parallel to the ground.
key_cues: Drive through heels,Squeeze glutes,Chin tucked

name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells or kettlebells at your sides and walk forward while maintaining upright posture.
key_cues: Shoulders back,Core tight,Steady steps

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Place a barbell across your upper back. Squat down by bending hips and knees until thighs are parallel to the floor. Stand back up by driving through the heels.
key_cues: Chest up,Knees out,Brace core

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Stand upright and rise onto your toes. Bend knees forward while keeping torso upright and hips extended. Push back up to standing.
key_cues: Stay upright,Knees forward,Controlled motion

name: Unilateral Box Squat
instructions: Stand on one leg in front of a box or bench. Lower into a squat until you lightly touch the box. Stand back up using the working leg.
key_cues: Control descent,Knee over toes,Balance steady

name: Reverse Crunch with Leg Extension
instructions:
Lie on your back on a bench or the floor with your hips and knees bent at 90°.
Place your hands beside you or hold the bench for stability.
Engage your core and lift your hips off the surface in a reverse crunch motion.
At the top of the movement, extend your legs diagonally away from your body while keeping your core tight.
Slowly bend the knees again and lower your hips back to the starting position under control.
key_cues: Keep the movement controlled, Avoid swinging the legs, Lift the hips using your abs rather than momentum, Maintain lower-back contact with the bench during the lowering phase, Exhale during the crunch, Keep your core braced throughout the movement

name: Ring Fall Out
secondary_muscles: Obliques, Transverse Abdominis, Latissimus Dorsi, Shoulders
instructions:
Adjust gymnastic rings to about waist height.
Kneel on the floor and hold the rings with arms extended in front of you.
Keeping your body in a straight line and core tight, slowly lean forward allowing the rings to move ahead of you.
Lower until you feel strong core tension, then engage the abs to pull the body back to the starting position.
key_cues: Keep the body in a straight line, Avoid arching the lower back, Move slowly and under control, Brace the core throughout the movement, Pull back using the abs\, not the arms.

name: Skater Squat
instructions:
Stand on one leg with the other leg bent behind you.
Slowly bend the standing knee and lower your body while reaching the back knee toward the floor.
Keep your torso upright and balance on the working leg.
Push through the heel to return to the starting position.
key_cues: Keep the knee tracking over the toes, Stay balanced on the working leg, Control the descent, Keep the torso upright.

name: Kettlebell Staggered Stance Deadlift
instructions:
Stand holding a kettlebell with feet in a staggered stance, one foot slightly behind the other.
Most of the weight should be on the front leg.
Hinge at the hips while keeping the back flat and lower the kettlebell toward the floor.
Drive through the front heel and extend the hips to stand back up.
key_cues: Hinge at the hips\, not the spine, Keep the back neutral, Load the front leg, Drive through the heel and squeeze the glutes at the top.

name: Dumbbell Skullcrusher
instructions:
Lie on a bench holding dumbbells with arms extended above your chest.
Keeping the upper arms mostly vertical, bend the elbows and lower the dumbbells toward the sides of your head.
Extend the elbows to return to the starting position.
key_cues: Keep the upper arms still, Control the lowering phase, Fully extend the elbows at the top, Avoid flaring the elbows too wide.

name: Quadriceps Stretch
instructions:
Stand upright with feet hip-width apart.
Bend one knee and bring your heel toward your glutes.
Grasp your ankle with the hand on the same side.
Keep your knees close together and your torso upright.
Gently pull the heel closer to your glutes until you feel a stretch in the front of the thigh.
Hold the stretch for the desired duration.
Slowly release and repeat on the other leg.
key_cues: Keep knees aligned and close together, Maintain an upright torso, Engage the core to avoid arching the lower back, Push the hip slightly forward for a deeper stretch.

name: Rowing
secondary_muscles: Glutes, Hamstrings, Trapezius, Rhomboids, Biceps, Erector Spinae, Abdominals, Deltoids
instructions:
Sit on the rowing machine and secure your feet in the foot straps.
Grab the handle with both hands using an overhand grip.
Start in the catch position: knees bent, shins vertical, torso slightly forward, arms straight.
Drive phase: push through the legs first while keeping the arms straight.
When the legs are nearly extended, lean the torso slightly back and pull the handle toward the lower ribs.
Finish position: legs extended, handle near the torso, elbows pulled behind the body.
Recovery phase: extend the arms, hinge the torso forward, then bend the knees to slide back to the catch position.
Repeat in a smooth and controlled rhythm.
key_cues: Push with the legs first, Arms stay straight during the drive start, Keep chest tall, Neutral spine, Pull handle to lower ribs, Control the recovery
